name: Peanut Butter Cereal Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 9 x 13 pan.
2. In a large bowl, combine the cereal and peanuts.
3. In a medium saucepan, combine the corn syrup, sugar, and brown sugar. Cook over medium heat until the mixture comes to a boil, stirring constantly.
4. Remove from heat; stir in the peanut butter until well blended.
5. Pour the peanut butter mixture over the cereal mixture and toss to coat evenly.
6. Press the mixture into the greased pan.
7. In a small saucepan over low heat, melt the chocolate chips and peanut butter, stirring constantly.
8. Spread the melted topping over the bars.
9. Let stand until set before cutting into bars.
